ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "price_max" REAL /* Maximum price of the product */,
  "price_min" REAL /* Minimum price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is active */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manufacturer is active */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the merchant's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the merchant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the merchant is active */,
  "active_since" TEXT /* Date the merchant started selling on the platform */,
  "rating" REAL /* Merchant's overall rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant offering the price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product offered by the merchant */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was last updated */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the price */,
  "is_promotion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the price is a promotional price */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_prices_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "is_thumbnail" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is a thumbnail */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_levels" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location (e.g., store, warehouse) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock level was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., store, warehouse) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is active */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
